feature_name: Increase pull-to-refresh maximum drag distance to roughly half screen height

completed_tasks.title: Change PULL_MAX from 150 to 400 in pullToRefreshUtils.ts
completed_tasks.description: In web/src/lib/components/pullToRefreshUtils.ts, change the PULL_MAX constant from 150 to 400. Keep PULL_DAMPING at 0.5 (no change). Run lint, type-check, and unit tests to confirm all pass without modification.
completed_tasks.definition_of_done: PULL_MAX is 400, PULL_DAMPING is 0.5, npm run lint + npm run check + npm run test all pass with no changes to test files.
